cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Sean could have gone to the bakery. So, the question is asking for the possible times based on the alibis given by his friends and the bakery's operating hours. Let me go through each person's account step by step. First, Sean woke up at 5am. That's just when he got up, so that doesn't necessarily tell us anything about when he's free. Then James saw Sean in class from 5am to 6am. So between 5 and 6, Sean was in school. David saw Sean at the deli buying lunch from 6am to 8am. So from 6 to 8, he was at the deli. Then Betty saw him at the mall from 8am to 9am buying clothes. So from 8 to 9, he's at the mall. Linda saw Sean on a rooftop from 9am to 5pm. That's a long time—9 in the morning until 5 in the evening. Then Tiffany saw Sean driving to the water park from 8pm to 9pm. And the bakery is closed after 9pm. So the bakery is closed after 9pm, so any time after 9pm is out. The options given are A) 8pm to 9pm; B) 5pm to 8pm; C) 8am to 9am; D) 9am to 5pm. Let me map out Sean's schedule.
